ddt:Target.Name: CD3_REPS_JTEKT_V2_2
ddt:Target.Description:
[R] 2020/07/20 Renult Juhyun Lee Modified "boost high voltage" size from 4 to 3, fomular : A:50, B:1200, C:100, and bit offset Modified "boost low voltage" size from 4 to 3, fomular : A:50, B:1200, C:100 , and bit offset
[R] 2020/04/14 Renult Juhyun Lee Modified "boost high voltage" temporarily for EIPF-C of HHN
[R] 2019/07/22 Renault Gunky YEE Modified Nissan DB according to Renault check result (V1.9 builer) - Upade DID names and data names - Delete data 'DTCDeviceAndFailureTypeOBD' and 'DTCFailureType.ManufacturerOrSupplier' that not used.
[7] 2019/06/26 Nissan XX6 M.Hoshino Modified Item: CF.
[6] 2019/06/14 Nissan XX6 M.Hoshino Modified Item: CF.
[5] 2019/05/29 Nissan XX6 M.Hoshino Added & Modified Item: CF.
[4] 2019/03/15 Nissan XX6 M.Hoshino Modified & Added item: Failures.
[3] 2019/03/14 Nissan XX6 M.Hoshino Modified item: Failures(OBD).
[2] 2019/03/12 Nissan XX6 M.Hoshino Added & Modified item : Failures.
[1] 2018/12/20 Nissan XX6 M.Hoshino Added item: DM, CF
[N] 2018/01/29 Nissan XX6 C.Kudo Intial Creation based on N_L21B_EPS_UDS_sharp2_20171031.xml.

Item.Text: Device and failure type ODB codding
circuit short to ground or open
circuit short to battery or open
signal rate of change below threshold
signal rate of change above threshold
signal bias level out of range / zero adj. failure
signal has too few transitions / events
signal has too many transitions / events
alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
value of signal protection calculation incorrect
Component or sys. operation obstructed or blocked
FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures

Data.Name: DTCFormatIdentifier
Data.Comment: DTC format - Renault/Nissan use value 0 (3 bytes DTC)

Data.Name: Steering wheel angle sensor internal status

Item.Text: disabled (default) => EPS will ignore HFP request(00h)
enabled => EPS able to receive HFP request from HFP(01h)
enabled => EPS able to receive HFP request from IPA(02h)

Request.Name: DataRead.Steering wheel angle sensor internal status

DataItem.Name: Steering wheel angle sensor internal status

Request.Name: DataRead.Internal Steering wheel angle offset
Request.Comment: Read Internal Steering wheel angle offset

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportDTC
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests / DDT : Unusable for Clip import
